    Enum ColorModes

    Represents the PSD file format color modes.

    Namespace: Aspose.CAD.FileFormats.Psd
    Assembly: Aspose.CAD.dll
    Syntax
    public enum ColorModes : short

    Bitmap

    The bitmap color mode.

    Cmyk

    CMYK color mode.

    Duotone

    Duotone color mode.

    Grayscale

    The grayscale mode.

    Indexed

    Indexed color mode.

    Lab

    Lab color mode.

    Multichannel

    Multichannel color mode.

    Rgb

    RGB color mode.
